L1Bridgehub.additional_comments: The version of Bridgehub deployed on L1 only.

L2Bridgehub.additional_comments: The version of Bridgehub deployed on L2/Gateway only.

L1ChainAssetHandler.additional_comments: Handles chain asset registration and migration on L1.

L2ChainAssetHandler.additional_comments: Handles chain asset registration and migration on L2/Gateway.

CTMDeploymentTracker.additional_comments: Tracks ChainTypeManager deployments across settlement layers.

L1MessageRoot.additional_comments: Aggregates message roots from all chains on L1.

L2MessageRoot.additional_comments: Aggregates message roots from all chains on L2/Gateway.

L1AssetRouter.additional_comments: Routes asset deposits and withdrawals on L1.

L2AssetRouter.additional_comments: Routes asset deposits and withdrawals on L2.

L1AssetTracker.additional_comments: Tracks asset registrations and metadata on L1.

L2AssetTracker.additional_comments: Tracks asset registrations and metadata on L2.

GWAssetTracker.additional_comments: Gateway-specific asset tracker for cross-chain asset management.

L1NativeTokenVault.additional_comments: Manages native token custody and bridging on L1.

L2NativeTokenVault.additional_comments: Manages native token custody and bridging on L2.

L1Nullifier.additional_comments: Handles withdrawal finalization and legacy bridge support on L1.

L1ERC20Bridge.additional_comments: Legacy ERC20 bridge on L1, mostly a thin wrapper around L1AssetRouter.

BridgedStandardERC20.additional_comments: Standard ERC20 token deployed on L2 representing a bridged L1 token.

AdminFacet.additional_comments: Diamond facet handling ZK chain administration (freezing, upgrades, fee params).

CommitterFacet.additional_comments: Diamond facet handling batch commitment logic.

ExecutorFacet.additional_comments: Diamond facet handling batch execution and proving.

GettersFacet.additional_comments: Diamond facet providing read-only view functions for chain state.

MailboxFacet.additional_comments: Diamond facet handling L1<->L2 message passing and transaction requests.

MigratorFacet.additional_comments: Diamond facet handling chain migration between settlement layers.

DiamondInit.additional_comments: Initialization contract for the Diamond proxy pattern.

DiamondProxy.additional_comments: The Diamond proxy contract that delegates to facets.

ValidatorTimelock.additional_comments: Enforces a delay between batch commitment and execution for security.

Governance.additional_comments: Main governance contract managing protocol upgrades with timelocks.

ChainAdmin.additional_comments: Per-chain admin contract that applies restrictions to admin calls.

ServerNotifier.additional_comments: Notifies off-chain server about important on-chain events.

DefaultUpgrade.additional_comments: Default upgrade implementation handling standard protocol upgrades.

GovernanceUpgradeTimer.additional_comments: Ensures minimum time between upgrade stages for safety.

InteropCenter.additional_comments: Central contract for cross-chain interoperability messaging.

InteropHandler.additional_comments: Handles incoming interop messages and dispatches to receivers.

GatewayTransactionFilterer.additional_comments: Filters transactions on the Gateway to enforce access policies.
